attributes.title: [ZooKeeper OTel] Overview
attributes.description: Overview of Apache ZooKeeper ensemble health, performance, and resource utilization. Covers latency, traffic, connections, saturation, and replication health across the ensemble.

params.markdown:
## [ZooKeeper OTel] Overview

This dashboard monitors Apache ZooKeeper ensemble health and performance:
- Node availability and ensemble quorum status
- Request latency and packet throughput
- Active client connections and outstanding requests
- File descriptor and data tree saturation
- Follower synchronization and replication health

query.esql:
TS metrics-generic.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.zookeeper.ruok IS NOT NULL
| STATS healthy_nodes = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.zookeeper.ruok))

TS metrics-generic.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.zookeeper.ruok IS NOT NULL
| STATS healthy_nodes = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.zookeeper.ruok))

TS metrics-generic.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.zookeeper.latency.max IS NOT NULL
| STATS peak_ms = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.zookeeper.latency.max))
| EVAL peak_latency = peak_ms / 1000.0

TS metrics-generic.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.zookeeper.latency.max IS NOT NULL
| STATS peak_ms = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.zookeeper.latency.max))
| EVAL peak_latency = peak_ms / 1000.0

TS metrics-generic.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.zookeeper.connection.active IS NOT NULL
| STATS connections = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.zookeeper.connection.active))

TS metrics-generic.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.zookeeper.connection.active IS NOT NULL
| STATS connections = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.zookeeper.connection.active))

TS metrics-generic.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.zookeeper.request.active IS NOT NULL
| STATS outstanding = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.zookeeper.request.active))

TS metrics-generic.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.zookeeper.request.active IS NOT NULL
| STATS outstanding = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.zookeeper.request.active))

TS metrics-generic.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.zookeeper.follower.count IS NOT NULL AND resource.attributes.server.state == "leader" AND attributes.state == "synced"
| STATS synced_followers = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.zookeeper.follower.count))

TS metrics-generic.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.zookeeper.follower.count IS NOT NULL AND resource.attributes.server.state == "leader" AND attributes.state == "synced"
| STATS synced_followers = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.zookeeper.follower.count))

TS metrics-generic.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.zookeeper.znode.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS znodes = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.zookeeper.znode.count))

TS metrics-generic.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.zookeeper.znode.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS znodes = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.zookeeper.znode.count))

TS metrics-generic.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.zookeeper.watch.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS watches = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.zookeeper.watch.count))

TS metrics-generic.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.zookeeper.watch.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS watches = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.zookeeper.watch.count))

TS metrics-generic.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.zookeeper.file_descriptor.open IS NOT NULL
| STATS open_fds = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.zookeeper.file_descriptor.open))

TS metrics-generic.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.zookeeper.file_descriptor.open IS NOT NULL
| STATS open_fds = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.zookeeper.file_descriptor.open))

TS metrics-generic.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.zookeeper.latency.max IS NOT NULL
| STATS peak_ms = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.zookeeper.latency.max)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), resource.attributes.server.state
| EVAL peak_latency = peak_ms / 1000.0
| KEEP time_bucket, peak_latency, resource.attributes.server.state
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-generic.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.zookeeper.latency.max IS NOT NULL
| STATS peak_ms = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.zookeeper.latency.max)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), resource.attributes.server.state
| EVAL peak_latency = peak_ms / 1000.0
| KEEP time_bucket, peak_latency, resource.attributes.server.state
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-generic.otel-default
| WHERE metrics.zookeeper.packet.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS packet_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.zookeeper.packet.count)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.direction
| SORT time_bucket ASC
